title: Physical Therapist

rationales.taskAutomation: Exercise-program documentation and outcome-measure tracking are automatable; hands-on manual therapy and movement assessment are not.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI motion-analysis and documentation tools are credible and improving but not yet standard practice equipment.
rationales.adoption: Larger outpatient and telehealth-enabled PT practices are adopting AI documentation and motion-tracking tools; broader adoption is still early.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can generate home-exercise plans and track outcome measures, but manual therapy and in-person motivation stay human.

salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 29-1123 (Physical Therapists), p25-p75 rounded
insight: AI handles documentation and outcome tracking, freeing PTs for the hands-on treatment that actually drives recovery. Demand keeps growing faster than the pipeline of new therapists.
